missing_requirements.evidence_quote: We can set the alarm to ‘on’ or ‘off’;
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow users to set the alarm to either 'on' or 'off'.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When the current time becomes that which is set on the alarm,
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall ring the alarm continuously when the current time matches the set alarm time.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to stop the alarm from ringing.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not explicitly mentioned in the source text. The original text only mentions stopping the alarm, but does not specify that it can be stopped by the user.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall ring the alarm continuously when the current time matches the set alarm time.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify what happens if the current time does not match the set alarm time. Does the alarm still ring, or does it stop?
